evidence: I am so starved for any decent drama with science and/or history backgrounds

I guess I am happy with the series because it is about something I love.
I can easily overlook their shortcomings.
I would have loved for this to have been a mini-series like 'The Winds of War, mixing history with a good fictional drama.'
These folks have a pretty solid cast, and wardrobe, and the shooting is decent.
I eventually got to meet Ian Tattersall, who introduced me to Don.
I also HEAVILY recommend 'In Search Of Human Origins' w/ Don Johansen.
I LOVE HAVING NEW INTELLIGENT INFORMATION LAID OUT LIKE THIS SHOW DOES.

A MUST SEE! Esp. for all black kids, and even adults who have been educated in our 'WHITEWASHED HISTORY' classes.

summary: The user has a strong preference for historical and dramatic content, often appreciating series that provide educational value. They favor slower-paced narratives that allow for deeper engagement with the subject matter, and they exhibit a high sensitivity to emotional resonance in the stories they consume.
